metadata.summary: 6 mandatory MCPs, @mcp:json-jq for JSON reads, jq terminal for updates

definition.core_duty: Citizens must use Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools for all operations. Missing MCP trails = evidence tampering

json_operations.update: jq terminal with atomic pattern (10ms, 80x faster)
json_operations.violation: NEVER use Read tool for JSON (-25 RL)

definition.scope: Pre-task context, execution monitoring, post-task validation, error resolution, pattern learning, knowledge storage, parliamentary participation

powers.ias: Cabinet Secretary audits activeContext.json compliance, Field Officers verify trails real-time, Home Officer ensures availability, Researcher optimizes patterns
powers.judicial: Chief Justice voids actions without trails, tribunals investigate omissions, establish precedents, escalate penalties
powers.parliamentary: Shadow Cabinet challenges MCP-less operations, Ministers cannot waive (0-99%), consensus tracks metrics, Opposition audits usage

workflow: PRE: @mcp:json-jq read scratchpad.json, retrieve patterns from memory.json, @mcp:context7 docs (if new), @mcp:fetch benchmarks, @mcp:sequential-thinking plan (≥3 steps)
DURING: Execute with code/markdown, calculate metrics, track milestones
POST: /validate workflow (HALT-FIX loop), jq update progress.json atomically, store patterns in memory.json, @mcp:git commit
ERROR: @mcp:context7 IMMEDIATE, @mcp:json-jq read mistakes.json prevention, @mcp:sequential-thinking fix plan, apply fix, jq update mistakes.json, @mcp:git commit
implementation.audit: IAS reads activeContext via @mcp:json-jq (READ), calculates compliance. Shadow Cabinet verifies trails, challenges omissions via jq terminal UPDATE to mistakes.json
implementation.rewards: Complete chain (pre+exec+post) = +10 RL. Incomplete = +5 RL. Missing critical = -15 RL. 10 consecutive = +20 bonus

violations.remediation: 30 operations 100% compliance, perfect trail documentation, IAS certification, memory.json contributions, Chief Justice approval
